selection_notes: Student candidate resolves all six engineer-identified gaps and the teacher-directed stop-condition ambiguity. The adversary exploit (scoring-rule derivation bypass) is credible but the student's strict gate already guards against it. The student candidate ranks above the original baseline on all engineer-identified dimensions.

original.selection_notes: Baseline — missing all six engineer-identified structural elements

student.selection_notes: Selected — resolves all gaps, strict scoring-rule gate guards against adversary exploit

adversary.selection_notes: Rejected — the exploit is credible but the student candidate already guards against it with its strict gate
